relations.note: Direction rule applies within the closed gradient set defined by the palette lock.
Adds a logo-contrast requirement specific to the masthead gradient within the approved set.

effect.reserved_for: the approved gradient set defined in the Gradient Specifications table (Brand Blue → Dark Navy, Sky Blue → Deep Blue, Sunshine → 75% Gold, Golden Sand → White → Light Blue, Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine, Sunshine → light gold masthead gradient)
effect.subject: background/section gradient fills

quotes: Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end

rules.intent: Preserve brand consistency by restricting gradient usage to a closed, pre-approved palette.
rules.rule_text: Only the approved gradient set (e.g., Brand Blue → Dark Navy #00529b → #011E45 for dark backgrounds/blue masthead/waves, Sky Blue → Deep Blue #358CCB → #003D74 for blue backgrounds/waves, Sunshine → 75% Gold #faa31b → Gold@75% for warm backgrounds, Golden Sand → White → Light Blue #FEF1C8 → #ffffff → #E6F0F9 for soft light backgrounds, Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine #FEF1C8 → Gold@75% → #faa31b for warm light-to-saturated backgrounds, and the Sunshine → light gold #faa31b → #ffe05c masthead gradient) may be used as backgrounds, combined with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. New gradients or unlisted color combinations must never be invented.

quotes: dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown
Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).

rules.intent: Ensure consistent visual direction of gradients across masthead and banner treatments.
rules.rule_text: In masthead/banner applications, approved gradients run horizontally, progressing from the dark/saturated stop on the left to the light stop on the right, matching the direction shown in the approved gradient table.

quotes: Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end
Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end

rules.intent: Guarantee sufficient contrast and legibility for the logo mark against its gradient background.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient (Sunshine → light gold, #faa31b → #ffe05c) is the required gradient for use behind the LISRAYA logo mark, providing contrast; the logo mark must sit at the lightest end of the gradient.
